description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to the latest LTS versions ensures long-term support, access to modern language features, improved security patches, and compatibility with the latest Spring ecosystem. Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and includes Spring Framework 6.x with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Update all related Spring dependencies to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Ensure build configuration (Maven/Gradle) targets Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded the PhotoAlbum-Java project to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.4. Updated pom.xml (Spring Boot 2.7.18→3.4.4, Java 8→21), migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java, and updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin:21. All unit tests pass (mvn clean test: BUILD SUCCESS).
